title: National Book Trust Accountant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: National Book Trust Recruitment 2026: National Book Trust has released the official notification for 1 Accountant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Commerce Degree, CA(Inter)/ICWAI(Inter)/MBA (Finance), 03 years experience in accounts/book keeping, Knowledge of TALLY or BUSY, GFR, GST & Tax compliance, Knowledge of Hindi, English and Marathi
qualification.details: Accountant: Essential: Commerce Degree from a recognized university. Desirable: CA(Inter)/ICWAI(Inter)/MBA (Finance), 03 years experience in accounts/book keeping in public sector organisations or private sector organizations including BRS work, Income Tax & GST compliance. Knowledge & work experience in TALLY or other accounting software (BUSY). Knowledge of Govt. Financial Rules (GFR), GST & Tax compliance. Knowledge of Hindi, English and Marathi language. Experience of working with Govt./PSU/Autonomous bodies.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nbtindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NBT Accountant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NBT Accountant position is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Commerce Degree from a recognized university. Desirable qualifications include CA(Inter)/ICWAI(Inter)/MBA (Finance) and relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Accountant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Accountant post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Accountant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NBT Accountant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it along with required documents via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Accountant position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Accountant in the National Book Trust.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is required for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 03 years of experience in accounts/bookkeeping is required. Experience in public or private sector organizations, including BRS work and tax compliance, is desirable.

faq.question: Q10. Which accounting software knowledge is preferred?
faq.answer: Knowledge and work experience in TALLY or other accounting software like BUSY is preferred for this role.
